milestoneTitle: Phase M9.18b — Dashboard Projects panel migrated to .dash-tile + dummy-fallback so the panel keeps its shape when the list is empty. renderContinueCard rewritten to emit the new fixed-slot markup: eyebrow carries 'Best/Easy path' + updated-ago relative timestamp (new timeAgoShort helper); duration slot reserved as em-dash (Projects have no duration); state pill resolves to Resume (updated > created) or Open; pin icon rolls up pinnedTools + pinnedSnippets count into a single filled/outline state; mastery + delete slots invisible-but-reserved so the Projects panel lines up pixel-for-pixel with the Learn panel. When getProjects() is empty, DASH_DUMMY_PROJECT renders a single example tile titled 'Build an MCP-powered knowledge agent' that routes to #projects/new on tap — keeps the shape visible and gives the user a clear starting action. Same dummy-fallback pattern added to renderDashLearn for defensive parity: DASH_DUMMY_LESSON 'Prompt Engineering Basics' routes to the Learn tab when tapped. Placeholder tiles carry data-placeholder=1 and get a subtle 0.82 opacity muting so they read as examples without losing slot geometry. Tools panel migration is the next step (M9.18c).
